description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a release_environment stage containing two jobs. Add a release-environment:notify job that runs in the release_environment stage, uses the command `bundle exec rake \"release_environment:notify[$RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_CI_PIPELINE_URL,$RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_NAME,$RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_VERSION]\"`, and is triggered only when the variable RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_PIPELINE is \"true\" and RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_NOTIFICATION_TYPE equals \"deploy\" (otherwise never). Add a release-environment:qa_notify_failure job that also runs in the release_environment stage, executes `bundle exec rake \"release_environment:qa_notify[$RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_CI_PIPELINE_URL,$RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_NAME,$RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_VERSION]\"`, and is triggered only when RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_PIPELINE is \"true\" and RELEASE_ENVIRONMENT_NOTIFICATION_TYPE equals \"qa\" (otherwise never). Both jobs inherit the .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens templates, which provide the Ruby environment and required CI tokens.
